sourceMovie.title: Step Brothers
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: People revisit Step Brothers for the same reason it broke through in 2008: clear stakes, memorable faces, and a comedy rhythm that doesn't stall in the middle. Adam McKay keeps the ensemble pointed in one direction. The film leans hard into its core genre, which is exactly what fans say they wanted more of from blockbusters in that era.

recommendations.title: 22 Jump Street
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Step Brothers clicked for you, 22 Jump Street (2014) is a strong next stop: both trade in comedy, with comic timing and sharper banter. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Step Brothers?
faq.answer: Try 22 Jump Street, Fast & Furious Presents: Hobbs & Shaw, Ferris Bueller's Day Off—each shares DNA with Step Brothers while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Step Brothers?
faq.answer: Step Brothers (2008) is best described as Comedy. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Step Brothers worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 6.6/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this comedy lane.
